name: pgi-tests
description: Python×ボドゲ道場の検証ハーネス(エンジン実行+ブラウザ実操作)

scripts.test: npm run test:python && npm run test:ui
scripts.test:ui: node ui/mobile-audit.mjs && node ui/challenge-ui-test.mjs && node ui/touch-test.mjs && node ui/kb-test.mjs && node ui/kifu-test.mjs && node ui/hint-test.mjs && node ui/error-ux-test.mjs
